productDisplayName: ADIDAS Women Adi Light White Fresh Shoe
description: CompositionWhite synthetic leather training shoes with blue lines, mesh upper and sides, and rubber outsole with pivot point on big toe mound and inner archWash care1. Remove dust with soft, clean, damp cloth2. Do not machine washSleek and feminine, these white shoes from adidas are made specially for the fashion forward women. The mesh on the upper and sides ensures ample ventilation for the feet, while the blue stripes on the side and blue padding at the back gives the pair that stylish edge. The rubber outsole with a pivot point on the big toe mound and inner arch ensures optimum grip and stability, making it a perfect footwear for training sessions at the Sports club or gym. Team it with jeans or casuals during picnics and keep your feet healthy and happy.
